notes: Active - reads the __UNIVERSAL_DATA_FOR_REHYDRATION__ JSON blob on a TikTok user profile page for core profile fields (username, nickname, TikTok ID, language, bio), then scans the page for video URLs and makes additional fetch requests to /@{username}/video/{id} to determine the region of the oldest/newest videos. Uses TikTok's own official @tiktok account as a stable public profile. wait_ms is generous because the video-region analysis involves clicking sort buttons and waiting up to ~6s for the grid to reload plus follow-up fetches.

checks.comment: At least one strong element with profile field content (username, TikTok ID, etc.)
